title: mentha aquatica f. limosa
intro: Mentha aquatica f. limosa, also known as a variety of water mint, is a subspecies of the peppermint plant characterized by its narrower leaves and more compact growth habit. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica f. limosa include relief from nausea, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of certain skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Mentha aquatica f. limosa can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the affected area.
